action.description: The action Akamai applies when the rule matches traffic. Common values include deny, none or alert.

name.description: Friendly name for the rule, used in UIs or logs to help administrators identify the rule (for example, 'Block suspicious user agents').

ruleId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the rule by Akamai or the integration. Use this identifier to reference, update, or remove the rule in API requests.
